title: Ash Shīḩānīyah Heat Wave
lead: A critical heat wave is affecting Ash Shīḩānīyah with a Z-Score of +3.00. Temperatures are extremely high, reaching a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The heat wave is causing extremely hot conditions, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 9.5 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 32%, and winds are moderate at 11.9 km/h. 
 The conditions are expected to persist, with no relief in sight, and a Heating Degree Day (HDD) value of 0.0 GG.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
